headline: Arta expands Arta AI to empower financial advisors and wealth managers with an AI Sidekick
the_so_what: Arta pivoting from direct-to-consumer private wealth into an advisor-facing AI Sidekick with institutional clients signals that AI-native firms see the B2B advisor channel as the faster growth path — and wealth CXOs now face a new class of infrastructure competitor that started with the end-client experience and is working backwards into the advisor stack.
summary: Arta Finance announced the expansion of Arta AI, positioning it as an AI Sidekick designed to empower financial advisors and wealth managers. The company also disclosed it has onboarded new institutional customers as part of this expansion. The announcement signals Arta's strategic push to extend its AI capabilities beyond individual investors toward serving the broader wealth management and financial advisory market.

verified_claims: Arta Finance announced the expansion of Arta AI
Arta AI is positioned as an AI Sidekick designed to empower financial advisors and wealth managers
The company disclosed it has onboarded new institutional customers as part of this expansion
